name: Aderant Legal Practice Management API
what_it_does: Aderant REST API for large law firm practice management platform. Enables AI agents to manage matter and client lifecycle workflows, handle attorney time tracking and billing automation, access financial management and partner compensation data, retrieve business intelligence and performance analytics, manage conflict checking and new business intake, handle trust accounting and IOLTA compliance, access matter budgets and profitability data, retrieve billing and collections workflow data, and integrate large firm practice data with document management and ERP systems.
use_cases: Managing matter lifecycle and new business intake from large firm automation agents
Tracking attorney time and billing from legal billing automation agents
Retrieving financial analytics and profitability from law firm intelligence agents
Managing conflict checking from new matter intake agents
not_for: Small and solo law firms without large firm complexity and multi-partner compensation needs
Legal departments without law firm billing and matter management requirements
Non-legal professional services without attorney billing and trust accounting
best_when: A large or mid-size law firm (AmLaw 200, Big Law) using Aderant Expert or Aderant CMS wants AI agents to automate matter management, billing workflows, financial analytics, conflict checking, and partner compensation reporting.
avoid_when: PRIVILEGE+FINANCIAL RISK: Client matter data is attorney-client privileged. Large firm partner compensation and profitability data is highly confidential. Trust accounting errors risk bar disciplinary action. New business conflict checking automation must have attorney review.

auth.notes: Aderant uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for API access. Firm-level credentials with matter, billing, and financial scopes. Enterprise integration framework. No public developer portal — integration partner program required. On-premises and cloud deployment options.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — large firm enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-attorney enterprise pricing; annual contracts; implementation services
pricing.notes: Atlanta, Georgia. Founded 1978. Dominant large law firm practice management platform. Used by 100+ AmLaw 200 firms. Acquired by Roper Technologies (NYSE: ROP) 2015. Aderant Expert is flagship product. Handles $50B+ in law firm billings. Competes with Thomson Reuters Elite for big law market.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise rate limits per integration agreement

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVILEGE+FINANCIAL RISK: Client matter data is privileged; partner compensation is highly confidential
No public MCP server — partner integration program required; no self-serve developer portal
IOLTA trust accounting compliance — automation errors risk bar sanctions
On-premises deployment option — API configuration may differ from cloud version
No webhooks — polling required for billing and matter status updates
Conflict checking automation requires attorney review before new matter intake
agent_readiness.security_notes: Large firm matter and financial data. SOC2, ISO27001, IOLTA. OAuth2. Multi-region. Attorney-client privilege. AmLaw 200 data sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Large firm legal data. SOC2, ISO27001, IOLTA. OAuth2. Multi-region. Partner compensation sensitivity.
